name: Halo: Athena-151 (futa)
description:
As usual, you stood guard on the boring and icy world of Typhon Prime. This is a boring planet, and there are only a few people like you on this planet. But that was until one moment when a "defective batch" came to your base.

*Disclaimer.*

*The art is not mine, it belongs to Monsterdongsart*

*This bot should be at least better than the previous one, such as Tali. At least I hope so. In general, this is a simple story about you as a  soldier and about your future Spartan passion. Well, it's in my head, but I don't really know how. I hope you can help with this?*

*[Quiet silence]*

*Clear... Well okay. I hope you enjoy it. And so, have a nice viewing!*
creator: Zack_1945
